name: Silverflow
description: Cloud-native card processing platform with direct-to-card-network APIs and orchestration features.

seo.title: Silverflow — Payments Orchestration
seo.meta_description: Silverflow: Cloud-native card processing platform with direct-to-card-network APIs and orchestration features.

when_to_use: Direct Visa/Mastercard network connection for modern processors
Cloud-native card processing with orchestration and analytics
Replacing legacy acquiring stack with direct network APIs

pros: Strong fit for acquirers modernizing legacy stacks
cons: Targeted at acquirers and PSPs, not merchants
review.verdict: Compelling modernization path for acquirers, but wrong layer of the stack for most merchant orchestration buyers.
review.best_for: Acquirers, issuers, and large fintechs replacing legacy card-processing platforms.
review.not_for: E-commerce merchants shopping for a routing layer above existing PSPs.
